subcodes.first_line: O Salman! Hearken unto that which the Spirit imparteth unto thee in these words, and that which the Dove doth warble [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا سلمان اسمع حینئذ ما یلقی الروح علیک فی هذه الکلمات و ما یطیر الورقاء
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prophecy and fulfillment, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @symbolism, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
